description_long: This is a three-seat bench with a weathered blue finish, featuring a slightly curved seat and backrest for each section. The bench is supported by two robust, white-painted metal frames on either end, which are slightly rusted, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The seat and backrest panels are made from a single molded piece per seat, with visible wear and rust patches, especially on the seat surfaces and edges. The backrest is straight and provides support for each seat, while the armrests are integrated into the side frames, curving upward and inward. The bench's design is utilitarian and sturdy, suitable for public spaces such as parks, bus stops, or urban waiting areas. The overall appearance suggests durability and resistance to heavy use, with a focus on function over aesthetics.
description: A weathered blue three-seat metal bench with curved seats, backrests, and integrated white metal armrests, showing signs of rust and outdoor wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing three blue seats with backrests, rust patches, and white metal armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved seat and backrest profile, as well as the white metal frame and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight backrests, the connecting metal bar, and the full width of the bench.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same curved seat and backrest profile, with visible rust on the white metal frame.
